message: 🌱 Add envoy: Peak EWMA load balancing mission (#504)

@@ -0,0 +1,78 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "envoy-20907-peak-ewma-load-balancing",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "envoy: Peak EWMA load balancing",
+    "description": "Peak EWMA load balancing. Requested by 19+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current envoy deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your envoy version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n envoy -l app.kubernetes.io/name=envoy\nhelm list -n envoy 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working envoy installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review envoy configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant envoy configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n envoy -l app.kubernetes.io/name=envoy\nkubectl get configmap -n envoy -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=envoy\n```\n*Title*: *I would like envoy to support peak EWMA load balancing, in addition to the existing load balancing algorithms.*\n\n*Description*:\n\nPlease correct me if this is already supported."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Peak EWMA load balancing",
+        "description": "Commit Message: PeakEWMA load balancer\nAdditional Description:\nAn improved PeakEWMA load balancer implementation, using P2C(Power of 2 Choices) with weighted active request and error rate fixed latency. The score of a host can be expressed by the following formula (the lower, the better)\n\n$$\nScore\n```yaml\n![Screen Shot 2024-03-27 at 18 00 06](https://github.com/envoyproxy/envoy/assets/20726865/be3adedc-cdfc-48e6-94fd-0c51b7aa3f61)\r\n\r\n\r\nHere is a graph showing the response time per pod:\r\nQuery is:\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n envoy -l app.kubernetes.io/name=envoy\nkubectl get events -n envoy --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Peak EWMA load balancing\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Commit Message: PeakEWMA load balancer\nAdditional Description:\nAn improved PeakEWMA load balancer implementation, using P2C(Power of 2 Choices) with weighted active request and error rate fixed latency.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "![Screen Shot 2024-03-27 at 18 00 06](https://github.com/envoyproxy/envoy/assets/20726865/be3adedc-cdfc-48e6-94fd-0c51b7aa3f61)\r\n\r\n\r\nHere is a graph showing the response time per pod:\r\nQuery is:",
+        "![Screen Shot 2024-03-27 at 18 12 31](https://github.com/envoyproxy/envoy/assets/20726865/d71e333e-6ddd-4d82-b28d-868b5943fe36)\r\n\r\nWhen looking at Envoy:"
+      ]
+    }
